title: Colorblind Improved Wool
description: Colorblind friendly wool overlay with unique patterns, in a softer color palette and outlined!
body:
Wool overlay with different patterns to be recognizable regardless of color! Uses the palette from [improved wool](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/improvedwool)

Made for colorblind accessibility in minigames such as hypixel bedwars, or just regular survival!

![An image of every color of minecraft wool, each with a different pattern.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9NqXuIyN/images/aae49bd40e36c259dc2033458a330deccae7c2ff.png)
